summary: Completed testing of Responsables catalog feature (Iteration 9). All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with Responsables tab in Configuración, CRUD operations working, and SearchableSelect combobox for responsable field in both vulnerability form and bulk actions modal.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, not blocking
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: POST /api/config/responsables - Creates responsable with nombre and email (200)
GET /api/dropdown-options - Includes responsables list with nombre and email
PUT /api/config/responsables - Cascade update propagates name change to vulnerabilities
UI: Responsables tab visible in Configuración
UI: Responsables form has nombre and email fields
UI: Responsables CRUD operations work (create, list, edit, delete)
UI: Responsable field in vulnerability form is a SearchableSelect combobox
UI: Responsable combobox has search functionality
UI: Responsable field in bulk actions modal is a SearchableSelect combobox
UI: Created responsables appear in dropdown options with email
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor improvement
seed_data_creation: Test responsables created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features fully tested: 1) Responsables CRUD endpoints at /api/config/responsables all working with proper authentication. 2) Responsables tab in Configuración page with full CRUD UI. 3) SearchableSelect component used for responsable field in vulnerability form (lines 1095-1111 in Vulnerabilidades.jsx) and bulk actions modal (lines 1289-1304). 4) Dropdown-options endpoint includes responsables with nombre and email. 5) Cascade update works - changing responsable name updates all associated vulnerabilities.
